Title: Characterization of archaeological quarries, sources, and artefacts from the island of Eiao
Abstract: Geological material and archaeological artefacts from Eiao (Marquesas Islands, French Polynesia) were analysed using two different non-destructive EDXRF spectrometer
Authors(s): 1. McAlister, Andrew ; 2. Mills, Peter; Lundblad, Steven
Institution of the author: 1. University of Auckland (New Zealand), 2. University of Hawai'i at Hilo (USA)
Creator: Hermann, Aymeric
Complete reference 1: Charleux, M., McAlister, A., Mills, P. R. & Lundblad, S. P. Non-destructive XRF Analyses of Fine-grained Basalts from Eiao, Marquesas Islands. Journal of Pacific Archaeology 5, 75–89 (2014).
Complete reference 2: Charleux, M., McAlister, A., Mills, P. R. & Lundblad, S. P. Non-destructive XRF Analyses of Fine-grained Basalts from Eiao, Marquesas Islands. Journal of Pacific Archaeology 5, 75–89 (2014).
Complete reference 3: Charleux, M., McAlister, A., Mills, P. R. & Lundblad, S. P. Non-destructive XRF Analyses of Fine-grained Basalts from Eiao, Marquesas Islands. Journal of Pacific Archaeology 5, 75–89 (2014).
